Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Union for Radical Political Economics and "Review of Radical Political Economics" records
Union for Radical Political Economics (URPE)
3791
35.4 cubic feet. 35.4 cubic feet.
1961-2013. Correspondence, minutes, printed material, financial and administrative records, scholarly papers. Includes correspondence, memoranda, editorial board minutes, and other records of the Union for Radical Political Economics (URPE) and of its publication, the "Review of Radical Political Economics" (RRPE). General

ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
The Union for Radical Political Economics (URPE) was founded in 1968 by graduate students and faculty from the University of Michigan, Harvard University, and Radcliffe College. The organization promotes an interdisciplinary approach to political economics that considers political science, sociology, and social psychology. URPE's annual activities include a winter meeting as part of the Allied Social Science Association (ASSA) and a summer conference. URPE publishes a quarterly journal, "Review of Radical Political Economics" (RRPE), and a bi-monthly newsletter.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes correspondence, memoranda, editorial board minutes, and other records of the Union for Radical Political Economics (URPE) and of its publication, the "Review of Radical Political Economics" (RRPE). Other acronyms commonly used in the collection include American Economic Association (AEA), Allied Social Sciences Assocations (ASSA), Steering Committee Monthly Reports (BAG).
COLLECTION ARRANGEMENT
Series I. Articles Submitted for Publication in RRPE Boxes 1, 2, 5, 14, 20-23, 26, 27, 33, 34
Series II. Articles Submitted for Publication to Specific RRPE Issues Boxes 2, 3, 15-20, 24,25
Series III. Editorial Records of RRPE Boxes 3, 6, 14, 32
Series IV. URPE Records 1969-1986 Boxes 4, 41
Series V. Publications Boxes 4, 6, 7, 41
Series VI. The Review of Radical Political Economics (RRPE) Boxes 6, 7
Series VII. Summer Conference Papers Boxes 6, 8, 9, 41
Series VIII. Other Conferences Box 6, 10, 41
Series IX. URPE Steering Committee Box 11, 41
Series X. URPE Records and Miscellany Boxes 5, 6, 10, 12-14
Cite As:
Union for Radical Political Economics and Review of radical political economics records, #3791. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Note:
Boxes 1 to 6 sorted separately from other materials. Boxes 7 to 15 processed in 2005.
Boxes 41 and 42 were donated in 2017 by Michael Zweig, a founding member of URPE.
Access Restrictions:
Access to all unpublished materials not related to the screening of articles for the "Review" restricted for 15 years from the date of creation or by permission of the author.
Access Restrictions:
Access to all unpublished materials related to the screening of articles for the "Review" restricted for the lifetime of the parties involved with the correspondence or by permission of the parties involved.
Radicalism. Economics. Review of radical political economics.
